{{Infobox character
| name = Benri Vallenar
| aliases = Mister Vallenar, Benri
| children = {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Varic Vallenar|Varic]]}}
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|copying guns and shield generators, generate colorless copies of himself}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|President, [[Archmage]], [[Benri Vallenar|Mister Vallenar]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Vallenar Corporation]], Vallenar family}}{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|, [[Vallenar crew]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|President}}
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Captain (novel)|The Captain]]
}}

''See also: [[Benri Vallenar Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Benri Vallenar is the president of the [[Vallenar Corporation]], a powerful entity with significant influence over the galaxy. He is characterized by his commanding presence, often appearing in tailored suits or expensive silk clothing, and possesses a unique magical discipline that allows him to gain deep insight into the true nature of people. He is the father of [[Varic Vallenar]], the [[Archmage]] and Captain of the starship [[The Last Horizon]]. Benri's relationship with his son is complex, involving both professional interest and personal tension, as he has sought to leverage Varic's status and assets for his own strategic gains. Throughout various conflicts, including encounters with the [[Iron King]] and political maneuvering within groups like [[Solstice]], Benri has navigated extreme danger, including being kidnapped and used as bait. Despite his immense wealth and reputation, he often feels like a hireling rather than a true leader of the universe. He maintains several properties, including shielded estates on the planet Fathom.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Benri Vallenar is a silver-eyed [[Archmage]] and a member of the [[Vallenar family]] who serves as the President of the [[Vallenar Corporation]]. A wizard with an impressive barrel chest, short silver hair, and a goatee, he wields a staff and a [[Mirror of Silence]]. While observing the ruins of an [[Iron Legion]] ritual room, he channeled a spell more powerful than any he had cast in centuries. Despite being the son of a man capable of wrestling immense amounts of [[Aether]], Benri faced grave danger when he released his unique magic to the control of the [[Legion]] king. During his encounter with the [[Iron King]], the man capable of generating colorless copies of himself and duplicating guns or shield generators was revealed to be the true Benri Vallenar.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">22</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Benri Vallenar]] is the President of the [[Vallenar Corporation]] and a silver-eyed [[Archmage]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c1">''The Captain'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Benri Vallenar]] is a man who channeled a greater spell than any he had ever cast in centuries.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c2">''The Captain'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Benri is the father of Varic.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Benri uses a staff.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Benri is a wizard.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Benri Vallenar]] is a man who observed the ruins of an [[Iron Legion]] ritual room.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3">''The Captain'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Benri Vallenar]] is the father of Varic.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Benri Vallenar]] is a member of the [[Vallenar family]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c6">''The Captain'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Benri Vallenar]] is in grave danger.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c20">''The Captain'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Benri Vallenar]] has silver hair that is slashed short and a goatee.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c25">''The Captain'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Benri Vallenar]] has cold, [[steel]] eyes.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Benri Vallenar]] has an impressive barrel chest.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Benri Vallenar]] is the real [[Benri Vallenar]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c28">''The Captain'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Benri Vallenar]] is an [[Archmage]] with a unique magic.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c28" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Benri released his magic to the [[Legion]] king’s control.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c28" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Benri Vallenar]] is the son of a man who can wrestle more [[Aether]] than any single wizard should be able to.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c34">''The Captain'', chapter 34</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Benri Vallenar]] uses a [[Mirror of Silence]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c34" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Benri Vallenar]] is associated with the [[Vallenar Corporation]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c34" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Mister Vallenar is addressed by the [[Vallenar Corporation]] representative.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c38">''The Captain'', chapter 38</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Benri Vallenar]] is in the presence of the [[Iron King]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c42">''The Captain'', chapter 42</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Benri is capable of copying guns and shield generators.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c43">''The Captain'', chapter 43</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Benri can generate colorless copies of himself.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c43" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Benri Vallenar]] has dark skin and silver eyes and hair.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c33">''The Engineer'', chapter 33</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Benri Vallenar is a silver-haired man who serves as the father to the narrator. Having applied to an organization, he maintains a lifestyle defined by his professional commitments. He often works late into the night, viewing his entire existence as an extension of his labor. During certain interactions, he has been known to gesture toward [[Horizon]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Benri Vallenar]] is the father of the narrator.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c15">''The Knight'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Benri Vallenar]] has silver hair.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Benri gestured to [[Horizon]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c22">''The Knight'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Benri Vallenar]] works late and considers his life an extension of his work.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c45">''The Knight'', chapter 45</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Benri is a character who applied to an organization.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c45" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Benri Vallenar, the President of the [[Vallenar Corporation]] and an [[Archmage]], is a clone who has previously undergone long-term stasis. While serving as a member of the [[Vallenar crew]], he experienced a bad premonition and received a recording involving a conversation with [[Nila]]. Throughout these events, he utilized an optical implant and worked at a console to analyze a data core while managing various possibilities. Despite surviving a direct conversation with the [[Iron King]], he felt an unsatisfied smugness regarding a recent victory that he could not claim credit for. As the original version of himself, Benri possesses [[Aethertech]] enhancements that allow his clones to leave their bodies, and he is the father of the galaxy's greatest mortal spellcaster.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">28</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Benri Vallenar]] is a clone.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2">''The Pilot'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Benri Vallenar]] is President of the [[Vallenar Corporation]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Benri is a character who expresses difficulty in extending trust to unknown entities.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Mister Vallenar is the name used to address Benri.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Benri experienced a bad premonition in his stomach.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Benri Vallenar]] has a connection to Varic.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c5">''The Pilot'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Benri Vallenar]] has a son.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Benri received a recording of a meeting and conversation with [[Nila]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Benri is the President of the [[Vallenar Corporation]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c11">''The Pilot'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Benri Vallenar]] is a potential mastermind behind the Vallenar ship's movement.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c15">''The Pilot'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Benri is a member of the [[Vallenar crew]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18">''The Pilot'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Benri has an optical implant.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c22">''The Pilot'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Benri's son is the greatest mortal spellcaster in the galaxy.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Benri is a President.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Benri is hooking up a data core to a computer for analysis.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24">''The Pilot'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Benri tells the Captain that they are negotiating with him.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Benri Vallenar]] deals with possibilities.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32">''The Pilot'', chapter 32</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Benri is a person who uses a console.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Benri believed the [[Voice of Solstice]] and the lid were communicating.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c38">''The Pilot'', chapter 38</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Benri felt smug about the victory but was unsatisfied because he could not take credit for it.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39">''The Pilot'', chapter 39</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Benri is a clone and an [[Archmage]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Benri is the president of a galactic corporation.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Benri Vallenar]] is a man who survived a one-on-one conversation with the [[Iron King]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Benri Vallenar]] is the original version of Benri.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Benri has a son.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Benri is a Vallenar.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Benri's clones can leave a body due to [[Aethertech]] enhancements.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Benri has been in long-term stasis.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“Your…son? Is he working with the company again?”<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“How may I assist you, Mister Vallenar?”<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c38" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|"Are we going to talk this time," my father asked, "or are you going to have half a conversation and then hang up on me?"<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c15" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“It’s hard to extend trust when I don’t know who I’m dealing with,” Benri said.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“President Vallenar!” she said pleasantly.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Vallenar Corporation]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
